/cwe/weakness/221.Name: Information Loss or Omission
/cwe/weakness/221.Description: The product does not record, or improperly records, security-relevant information that leads to an incorrect decision or hampers later analysis.
/cwe/weakness/221.ExtendedDescription: This can be resultant, e.g. a buffer overflow might trigger a crash before the product can log the event.

Entries.IntroText: This code logs suspicious multiple login attempts.

Entries.BodyText: This code only logs failed login attempts when a certain limit is reached. If an attacker knows this limit, they can stop their attack from being discovered by avoiding the limit.
